caption: The video begins with a black screen displaying the text "MIEMSSmedia" in white, centered prominently. This initial frame serves as an introduction or title card, setting the stage for what is to follow. The scene then transitions to another black screen, this time devoid of any text or imagery, creating a momentary pause or break in the visual narrative. This sequence suggests a deliberate pacing, possibly to build anticipation or signal the start of a new segment within the video. The stark contrast between the two frames—text versus emptiness—emphasizes the branding and prepares the viewer for the content that will unfold next.
